landing.tagline_trad: Traditional systems say: it's going to rain.
landing.tagline_punch: TerraSafe says: this hillside is going to collapse.
landing.subtitle: Low-cost IoT sensor network that monitors soil moisture in real time and predicts landslides,saving lives in the Zona da Mata region.
landing.sim_btn: Simulate a sensor at your location
landing.award_desc: TerraSafe was awarded 1st place at the SmartCamp Smart Cities, organized by Viçosa SMART in partnership with LabMAKER and VUEI/UFV.
landing.how_sub: From soil to alert, in seconds

steps.title: Sensor buried in the soil
steps.desc: The EPD probe monitors hillside moisture 24/7, where the risk originates.

steps.title: Mesh network carries the data
steps.desc: Readings travel through a WiFi mesh of community nodes to the server.

steps.title: Live map triggers the alert
steps.desc: The dashboard updates in real time and triggers alerts when the soil saturates.

landing.context_stat1_label: confirmed in Zona da Mata · Feb/2026
landing.context_stat3_label: rainfall in 1 month in JF,INMET all-time record
landing.context_body: Viçosa sits in the same region, under the same risks. The problem is not the absence of climate forecasting,INMET already issues rainfall warnings. The problem is that a rain alert is not a landslide alert. 50 mm of rain on dry soil is absorbed without consequence. The same rain on already-saturated soil can trigger a landslide within hours.
landing.context_quote: Traditional systems say: it's going to rain. TerraSafe says: this hillside is going to collapse.
landing.context_news_1: Agência Brasil,72 deaths in MG floods (Mar/2026)
landing.context_news_2: SGB,Prevention saved R$ 800M in losses in 2023
landing.arch_sub: From sensor in the soil to alert in seconds
landing.mvp_sub: What was built and how it scales
landing.mvp_sensor_title: EPD Sensor (unit installed in the soil)
landing.mvp_sensor_desc: Waterproof cylinder ~1 meter tall, 80 cm buried. Cost per unit: R$ 60–80.
landing.mvp_scale_0_desc: 1–3 sensors. Functional dashboard. Proof of concept.
landing.mvp_scale_1_desc: 50–200 sensors at Civil Defense risk points across Viçosa.
landing.mvp_scale_2_desc: 1,000–5,000 sensors across Zona da Mata. Integration with SGB and CEMADEN.
landing.mvp_scale_3_desc: SaaS for municipalities + hardware. Expansion into precision agriculture.
landing.offline_body: This page displays real-time data from IoT sensors. Without the physical prototype connected, there is no data to display.
